parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded actors (the male learner and his female friend) with a digitally rendered AI tutor avatar. The AI tutor has an overly smooth, slightly uncanny appearance and perfectly synced but somewhat unnatural lip movements.

characters.appearance: A South Asian woman in her late 20s to early 30s with a medium complexion and a slim build. She has dark brown eyes, well-defined eyebrows, and her black hair is neatly tied back in a bun. Her facial features are symmetrical and she has a professional, pleasant smile.
characters.wardrobe: A dark navy blue business blazer over a light blue collared dress shirt.

characters.appearance: A South Asian young man in his late teens or early 20s with a slim build and a medium complexion. He has short, curly black hair, dark brown eyes, and a clean-shaven face. He has a youthful and expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored, off-white or beige button-down shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially focused and learning, then becomes enthusiastic and confident while explaining the app.

characters.appearance: A South Asian young woman in her late teens or early 20s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, wavy dark hair worn down, large dark eyes, and a round face. She wears silver dangling earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A white and light purple patterned top, possibly a kurta, with a v-neck.

scenes.setting: A split screen showing a modern office (top) and a plain room (bottom).
scenes.camera: Split-screen with two medium close-ups (talking heads).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A from the chest up. She is standing in a brightly lit, modern office with a blurred background of windows and pillars. She looks directly at the camera with a pleasant, encouraging smile, gesturing slightly with her hands as she speaks.

A medium close-up shot of Character B from the chest up. He is positioned against a plain, neutral-colored wall with soft, even lighting. He looks slightly upwards, as if reading from a screen, and repeats phrases with a focused expression.

scenes.visual_description: A vertically split screen shows two people. In the top panel, an AI tutor (Character A) in a business suit speaks from an office. In the bottom panel, a young man (Character B) repeats her phrases in a plain room. Subtitles in Tamil and English appear in both panels, corresponding to the speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: இந்த coffee ரொம்ப சூடா இருக்கு. [This coffee is very hot.]
Character A says: This coffee is very hot.
Character B says: The coffee is very hot.
Character B says: எனக்கு இந்த coffee taste ரொம்ப புடிச்சிருக்கு. [I like the taste of this coffee very much.]
Character A says: I like the taste of this coffee.
Character B says: I like the taste of this coffee.
scenes.on_screen_text:
இந்த coffee ரொம்ப சூடா இருக்கு.
This coffee is very hot.
எனக்கு இந்த coffee taste ரொம்ப பிடிச்சிருக்கு.
I like the taste of this coffee.

scenes.scene_label: Explaining the App to a Friend
scenes.setting: A split screen showing a home interior (top) and a plain room (bottom).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character C. She opens a light-colored wooden door and peeks into the room, her expression shifting from curious to surprised and engaged as she listens. The setting appears to be a simple home interior with neutral-colored walls.

A medium close-up shot of Character B against the same plain, neutral-colored wall. He turns his head slightly to the side, as if speaking to someone just off-camera. His expression is animated and enthusiastic as he explains something.

scenes.visual_description: A vertically split screen shows a conversation. In the top panel, a young woman (Character C) opens a door and listens with curiosity. In the bottom panel, the young man (Character B) enthusiastically explains how he is learning English using an app. Subtitles in Tamil appear in both panels, highlighting keywords.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Hey, நீ English எங்க கத்துக்குற? [Hey, where are you learning English?]
Character B says: SpeakX app-ல AI teacher கிட்ட கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்கேன். [I'm learning from an AI teacher on the SpeakX app.]
Character C says: என்னது? புரியலையே? [What? I don't understand.]
Character B says: இது ஒரு app. இதுல நீங்க daily AI English teacher கூட practice பண்ண முடியும். இப்ப இருக்க காலத்துல English தெரியலேன்னா job கிடைக்காது. ஏன்? Respect கூட கிடைக்காது. கரெக்ட்டா? அதனாலதான் daily just 10 to 15 minutes SpeakX app-ல இருக்க AI teacher கூட practice பண்றேன். Just 10 days தான் ஆச்சு. இப்ப என் English ரொம்பவே improve ஆயிருச்சு. இப்போ நான் பயமில்லாம confident-ஆ English பேசுறேன். அதுவும் ரொம்ப affordable. [This is an app. In this, you can practice daily with an AI English teacher. In this day and age, if you don't know English, you won't get a job. Why? You won't even get respect. Correct? That's why I practice daily for just 10 to 15 minutes with the AI teacher on the SpeakX app. It's only been 10 days. Now my English has improved a lot. Now I speak English confidently without fear. And it's very affordable.]
Character C says: நானும் English கத்துக்கணும்னு ஆசை. ஆனா இந்த மாதிரி courses-லாம் costly-ஆ இருக்கும்ல? [I also want to learn English. But aren't courses like this costly?]
Character B says: இல்ல, 7 days free trial இருக்கு. [No, there's a 7-day free trial.]
Character C says: Oh super! நான் இப்பவே SpeakX app download பண்றேன். [Oh super! I'm downloading the SpeakX app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:

scenes.setting: A smartphone screen against a solid orange background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is centered against a solid bright orange background. The phone screen displays an app interface. At the top is a logo. Below it, a thumbnail image shows a woman with long dark hair in a maroon top, smiling against a yellow background. The rest of the screen has text and a button.

scenes.visual_description: The final shot shows the SpeakX app interface on a smartphone against an orange background. The screen displays the app logo, a lesson thumbnail, the tagline 'Start speaking without fear today.', and a prominent 'DOWNLOAD NOW' button. A voiceover provides a call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: உடனே SpeakX ஆப் டவுன்லோட் பண்ணி AI டீச்சரோட இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கோங்க. [Download the SpeakX app immediately and learn English with an AI teacher.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
SpeakX
POWERED BY AI
LESSON 8: Daily English
Speak with AI
Start speaking without fear today.
DOWNLOAD NOW
